elements.sent-2411-001: In this article we study different extensions of the celebrated Hopf's boundary lemma within the context of a family of nonlocal, nonlinear and nonstandard growth operators.
elements.sent-2411-002: More precisely, we examine the behavior of solutions of the fractional $a-$Laplacian operator near the boundary of a domain satisfying the interior ball condition.
elements.sent-2411-003: Our approach addresses problems involving both constant-sign and sign-changing potentials.
elements.sent-2411-004: The Hopf's lemma for nonlocal operators has received significant attention in recent years, as it provides a powerful framework for analyzing nonlocal problems.
elements.sent-2411-005: This lemma enables applications across a wide range of scientific fields, including game theory, finance, image processing and Lvy processes among others.
elements.sent-2411-006: See for example \cite{B96, C12, CT, GO and the references therein.}
